characters.name: Al
characters.description: AlSERIESAlis an oft mentioned, once-seen recurring character on WB dramaGilmore Girls. Al is the owner ofAl's Pancake World. It was originally a pancake house, but later changed to a restaurant that served various types of cuisine. Lorelai says good morning to a man named Al in the beginning of the episodeA Messenger, Nothing More. It is suspected that this could potentially be Al from Al's Pancake World. Al is the owner ofAl's Pancake World. It was originally a pancake house, but later changed to a restaurant that served various types of cuisine. characters.name: Alex Lesman
characters.description: Alex LesmanBornAlexander LesmanOccupationSecurity Gate EngineerCoffee Shop OwnerEyesHairDark BrownDark BrownRELATIONSHIPSFamilyHillary Lesman(daughter)Jeff Lesman(son)RomancesLorelai Gilmore(dated)Unnamed lady(ex-wife)FriendsJoe MastoniSERIESPortrayed byBilly BurkeSeason(s)Season 3First seenLast seenI Solemnly SwearSwan SongEpisodes3 Alex Lesmanis a character inSeason 3ofGilmore Girls, portrayed byBilly Burke. Alex is the business partner of an old friend of Sookie's,Joe Mastoni, that Lorelai and Sookie run into at the Learning Center after taking a course on how to run an inn. Alex and his friend Joe are looking into opening a chain of coffee shops. While Sookie and Joe reminisce about old times Lorelai and Alex hit it off resulting in him calling her at the end of the episode to ask her on a date to try different types of coffee.[1]

characters.name: Allen Prescott
characters.description: Allen PrescottOccupationInsurance ConsultantEyesHairBlueBrownRELATIONSHIPSRomancesHollan Prescott(wife)FriendsRichard Gilmore•Emily GilmoreSERIESPortrayed byRichard FancySeason(s)Season 1Only seenForgiveness and StuffAllen Prescottis a guest character onGilmore Girls, portrayed byRichard Fancy. Allen is a business associate of Richard's. He attends their annual Christmas party with hiswife, who is also a friend of Emily's. The Prescotts know both Rory and Lorelai from previous Christmas parties. Allen and Richard discuss a new associate named Henry, who is younger than them. Richard is in uproar that Henry altered Richard's work without telling him, while Allen cautions him to play the long game given they make work for him one day, according to Allen's office hearsay. Allen appears to be quite a cynical and shrew character, who makes a misogynist joke about Henry paying for sex with possible women that Richard refers to as 'tramps'.

characters.name: Althea
characters.description: AltheaEducationStudent atYaleEyesHairDark BrownBlackRELATIONSHIPSFriendsJanet BillingsSERIESPortrayed byDana DavisSeason(s)Season 5Only seenSay SomethingAltheais a character inSeason 5ofGilmore Girls, portrayed by Dana Davis. Althea is a Yale student who is good friends withJanet Billings, Rory and Paris's freshmen year dorm mate. During their junior year, on Paris's suggestion, Rory asks Althea and Janet for dating advice after hooking up with Logan. Althea asks Rory detailed questions to really be able to make helpful suggestions about what Rory should do next. Though both she and Janet are nice and helpful, as they leave Paris tells Rory they have “styrofoam for brains”.

characters.name: Andrew
characters.description:
AndrewRELATIONSHIPSFamilyUnnamed boy(son)[1]FriendsJackson BellevilleSERIESPortrayed byMike GandolfiSeason(s)1•2•3•4•5•6First seenLast seenLove and War and SnowWelcome To The DollhouseSummer(AYITL)Episodes22Andrewis a recurring character onGilmore Girls, portrayed byMike Gandolfi. Andrew owns and runs Stars Hollow Books and is a member of theBattle of Stars Hollowreenactors. His love life is a running joke throughout the series with him and his date always getting into a fight at the same time at the Dance Marathon and Gypsy reading letters from his girlfriend when Stars Hollow as a new mailman.  
In season two he mentions that his kid told him that Jess pulled the fire alarm at school. This is never brought up again. characters.name: Anna Nardini
characters.description: Anna NardiniFromStars HollowResidenceNardini HouseOccupationProprietor atAnna's ShopEducationStars Hollow High SchoolEyesHairBlueDark RedRELATIONSHIPSFamilyApril Nardini(daughter)RomancesLuke Danes(ex-boyfriend)SERIESPortrayed bySherilyn FennSeason(s)6•7First seenLast seenThe Perfect DressTo Whom It May ConcernEpisodes8Anna Nardiniis a recurring character onGilmore Girls, portrayed bySherilyn Fenn. Anna is the mother ofApril Nardini, Luke's biological daughter. She is quite similar to Lorelai, in her musical and fashion tastes. Anna and Lorelai also share the quality of being fiercely protective over their daughters. She and Luke dated for a period in the early '90s, Anna describing Luke as anti-kid at the time they were together.[1] The character changes drastically from a protective single mother who is on okay terms with her ex-boyfriend, to being completely anti Luke being a part of April's life or having any rights as a parent. This is due to the original creators leaving the series afterSeason 6. Anna is the mother ofApril Nardini, Luke's biological daughter. This is due to the original creators leaving the series afterSeason 6.

characters.name: April Nardini
characters.description: April NardiniBirthdayApril 1993[1]FromWoodbridgeEducationCollege studentStudent at Martin Van Buren Middle SchoolEyesHairDark BrownDark BrownRELATIONSHIPSFamilyAnna Nardini(mother)Luke Danes(father)Lorelai Gilmore(step-mother)Rory Gilmore(step-sister)Jess Mariano(paternal cousin)Doula(paternal cousin)Liz Danes(paternal aunt)Dr. Rex Nardini (maternal uncle)William Danes † (paternal grandfather)Louie Danes † (paternal great-uncle)RomancesFreddie (crush)FriendsMartiaSERIESPortrayed byVanessa MaranoSeason(s)6•7•AYITLFirst seenLast seenThe Prodigal Daughter ReturnsSummerEpisodes14April Nardiniis a recurring character onGilmore Girls, portrayed byVanessa Marano. April discovered she was the daughter of Luke Danes after testing the DNA of three different men which she only did the DNA test to win a science fair. April and Luke have grown to like each other at Luke's insistence and she has endeavored to introduce Luke to new things, like going to Target stores. Anna's mother gets very sick and Anna goes to live with her for a few months. In the meantime, April lives with Luke in Stars Hollow and goes back and forth to her school. While living with Luke, April wants to go to a boy-girl party, and freaks out when he asks her if there will be kissing, but he claims she has a fever and forbids her from going. She thinks he was lying since he was worried about kissing, since it was a boy-girl party, she yells at him and tells him he sucks as a dad. April got so bad, that Luke called Lorelai for help, and she guesses that April has appendicitis and should go to the hospital. April discovered she was the daughter of Luke Danes after testing the DNA of three different men which she only did the DNA test to win a science fair. April and Luke have grown to like each other at Luke's insistence and she has endeavored to introduce Luke to new things, like going to Target stores.

characters.name: Reverend Archie Skinner
characters.description: Reverend Archie SkinnerBornArchibald SkinnerRELATIONSHIPSFriendsRabbi David BaransSERIESPortrayed byJim JansenSeason(s)3,4,5,6,AYITLFirst seenLast seenTake the Deviled Eggs...FallEpisodes7Archie Skinneris a recurring character onGilmore Girls. He is portrayed byJim Jansen. Archie Skinner is the reverend at the church inStars Hollow's town square. He shares the church facilities with the Rabbi David Barans and is seen conducting the funerals ofFran Weston[1],the baptism of Sookie and Jackson's children, Davy and Martha Belleville,and the wedding of Luke and Lorelai. He is first seen with theRabbideciding whether to allow the 'Town Loner' to protest on the steps of the church, since Taylor turned him down to protest in the town square.[2]He is also seen participating in other town events, like the discussion and reenactment of theBattle of Stars Hollow.[3] Archie Skinner is the reverend at the church inStars Hollow's town square. He shares the church facilities with the Rabbi David Barans and is seen conducting the funerals ofFran Weston[1],the baptism of Sookie and Jackson's children, Davy and Martha Belleville,and the wedding of Luke and Lorelai. He is first seen with theRabbideciding whether to allow the 'Town Loner' to protest on the steps of the church, since Taylor turned him down to protest in the town square.[2]He is also seen participating in other town events, like the discussion and reenactment of theBattle of Stars Hollow.[3]

characters.name: Asher Fleming
characters.description: Asher FlemingBirthday1942AKAProfessor FlemingOccupationTenured professor atYaleWriterDiedSummer 2004 (aged 62)RELATIONSHIPSFamilyLeonard (son), Andrea (granddaughter), Sarah (granddaughter)RomancesParis Geller(ex-girlfriend)Unnamed ex-girlfriendsUnnamed ex-wifeFriendsRichard GilmoreSERIESPortrayed byMichael YorkSeason(s)Season 4First seenLast seenTed Koppel's Big Night OutLuke Can See Her FaceEpisodes4Asher Flemingis a recurring character onSeason 4ofGilmore Girls, portrayed byMichael York. Unnamed ex-girlfriendsUnnamed ex-wife Asher is aYaleprofessor and author, who develops a romantic relationship withParis Geller. The two meet throughRichard Gilmore, because Asher and Richard were classmates atYale.[1]Despite the massive age difference, Paris and Asher had a serious relationship throughout Paris andRory's freshman year of Yale.[2][3][4] Asher is aYaleprofessor and author, who develops a romantic relationship withParis Geller. The two meet throughRichard Gilmore, because Asher and Richard were classmates atYale.[1]Despite the massive age difference, Paris and Asher had a serious relationship throughout Paris andRory's freshman year of Yale.[2][3][4] Asher dies of a heart attack two weeks before Rory and Paris's sophomore year of Yale begins.[5]He was teaching a Shakespeare class in Oxford when he had the heart attack. He left Paris an eighteenth-century printing press, which she briefly stored in the common room she shared with Rory.[6]

characters.name: Babette Dell
characters.description: Babette DellBornBabette (last name n/a)AKABabsResidenceDell HouseRELATIONSHIPSFamilyApricot(cat)Cinnamon† (cat)RomancesMorey Dell(husband)FriendsMiss Patty,Lorelai GilmoreSERIESPortrayed bySally StruthersFirst seenLast seenThe Lorelais' First Day at ChiltonSummerEpisodes54 Babette Dellis a recurring character onGilmore Girls, portrayed bySally Struthers. LorelaiandRory's next door neighbor and friend. She's known for her raspy voice, her frequent mentions of her husbandMorey(who appears much less on camera) and a penchant for making inappropriate comments. However, she means extremely well and has a sweet heart. LorelaiandRory's next door neighbor and friend. She's known for her raspy voice, her frequent mentions of her husbandMorey(who appears much less on camera) and a penchant for making inappropriate comments. However, she means extremely well and has a sweet heart. She is protective of Lorelai and Rory and cares about them very much. In early episodes, she has a cat named Cinnamon, who laterpasses away. In another early episode, she gets a new kitten, Apricot, whom Rory takes care of. She is portrayed by Sally Struthers.

characters.name: Beau Belleville
characters.description: Beau BellevilleEyesHairBlueBrownRELATIONSHIPSFamilyJackson Belleville(brother)Sookie St. James(sister-in-law)Davey Belleville(nephew)Martha Belleville(niece)Unborn Baby(niece or nephew)SERIESPortrayed byNick OffermanSeason(s)4•6First seenLast seenThe Festival of Living ArtAlways a Godmother, Never a GodEpisodes2Beau Bellevilleis a character onGilmore Girls, portrayed byNick Offerman. Beau is the older brother ofJackson. When Jackson andSookiewas preparing for the birth of their son,Davey, Beau took off from work and stayed with them inStars Hollowto help with the preparations. When both Davey andMarthawere baptized a few years later, he stayed at theDragonfly Inn. When Jackson was also baptized, he stepped in as the acting godfather. His cousinRoonmistakenly told him thatLorelai Gilmorewas a nympho, and hit on her during his stay.

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: BillBornWilliam (last name n/a)AKABillOccupationStudent atYaleEditorial assistant at theYale Daily NewsEditor of theYale Daily NewsRELATIONSHIPSFriendsRory GilmoreDoyle McMasterGlenn BabbleRajJoniA.K.SheilaSERIESPortrayed byDevon MichaelsSeason(s)6,7First seenLast seenJust Like Gwen and GavinFrench TwistEpisodes9Billis a recurring character onGilmore Girls, portrayed byDevon Michaels. Bill works at theYale Daily News. WhenParis Gellerbecomes too demanding, causing everyone butRory Gilmoreto quit the paper, Bill stays behind to watch the paper fail due to Paris. He later hands Rory the Wall Street Journal to show her an article whereMitchum Huntzbergerinsinuated that his giving Rory her first internship led to her being the editor of the Yale Daily News. When Rory was done as editor-in-chief of the paper, Bill succeeded her in the position. Bill works at theYale Daily News. characters.name: Bootsy
characters.description: BootsyBirthdayca. 1965 (age 58)OccupationOwner of Stars Hollow Newspaper StandSERIESPortrayed byBrian TarantinaSeason(s)2,AYITLFirst seenLast seenSadie, Sadie...SpringEpisodes6Bootsyis a recurring character onSeason 2of WB drama Gilmore Girls. He is portrayed by Brian Tarantina. Bootsy owns and runs the newsstand inStars Hollow. We learn in 2.08 that the newsstand belonged to his father before him and that he went to school withLuke Danes. characters.name: Brad Langford
characters.description: Brad LangfordSERIESPortrayed byAdam WylieSeason(s)2,3First seenLast seenRun Away, Little BoyThose Are Strings, PinocchioEpisodes5 Brad Langfordis a recurring character on WB dramaGilmore Girls. He is portrayed byAdam Wylie. Brad is a student at Chilton. He leaves Chilton to go to another school and reenters after being advised by his psychiatrist to face his fears (Paris). He also leaves for a brief period during Season 3 to be in the Broadway musical, "Into the Woods." Brad is a student at Chilton. characters.name: Brandi Covington
characters.description: Brandi Covingon is an eligible bachelorette thatEmilymomentarily ponders setting up withChristopher, much to the irritation ofLorelai.   She does not appear on screen. According to Emily, she has a wonderful sense of humor, a fact with which Lorelai disagrees.  (Driving Miss Gilmore)

characters.name: Brennon Lewis
characters.description: Brennon LewisAKAFroggyOccupationWaiter atLuke's Diner(formerly)EducationStudent atStars Hollow High SchoolStudent atStars Hollow Middle SchoolEyesHairBlueBlondSERIESPortrayed byGreg CipesSeason(s)Season 4Only seenTed Koppel's Big Night OutBrennon Lewisis a guest character onSeason 4ofGilmore Girls, portrayed by Greg Cipes. Brennon was a waiterLukehired at hisdiner. He was forgetful and had a laidback nature, doing things like giving Kirk "butt napkins" and not rememberingRory Gilmorealthough they went to school together. After Luke's customers complained about his poor service Luke yelled at them and said to give him a fair go, but moments later he took back his words after seeing Brennon goofing off in the diner. It is implied that Luke fired him.

characters.name: Brian Fuller
characters.description: Brian FullerAKABriOccupationBass player forHep AlienRELATIONSHIPSFamilyTurner (cousin)Susan (aunt)RomancesKyonFriendsDave RygalskiLane KimZack Van GerbigGilSERIESPortrayed byJohn CabreraSeason(s)3•4•5•6•7•AYITLFirst seenLast seenOne's Got Class and the Other One DyesBon VoyageSpring(AYITL)Episodes32Brian Fulleris a recurring character onGilmore Girls, portrayed byJohn Cabrera. Brian plays bass guitar inHep Alien, and was roommates withZack Van GerbigandLane Kimafter Lane moved out of hermother's house. He and Zack had a bunk bed in the living room. His character is the arguably the least-defined of the group, however we know some of his quirks. For instance, he has a collection of Futurama figurines, and likes playing videogames. We know that he at least occasionally writes songs with Zack, but Zack feels he gives in too easily. He suffers from a number of ailments, including asthma, hypoglycemia, deviated septum, and rosacea. He wears glasses. Brian plays bass guitar inHep Alien, and was roommates withZack Van GerbigandLane Kimafter Lane moved out of hermother's house. He and Zack had a bunk bed in the living room. His character is the arguably the least-defined of the group, however we know some of his quirks. For instance, he has a collection of Futurama figurines, and likes playing videogames. We know that he at least occasionally writes songs with Zack, but Zack feels he gives in too easily. He suffers from a number of ailments, including asthma, hypoglycemia, deviated septum, and rosacea. He wears glasses. In one storyline, Brian wrote a song called "Lane," while Zack and Lane were dating, though he never showed any romantic interest in Lane. He was however interested inKyon(played by Susane Lee), a foreign exchange student taken in by Mrs. Kim after Lane moves out. She and Brian are seen flirting multiple times throughout the last seasons.

characters.name: Burt
characters.description: BurtRELATIONSHIPSFriendsAndrew•Sy•Harry PorterSERIESPortrayed byDion AndersonSeason(s)2•5First seenLast seenDead Uncles and VegetablesWomen Of Questionable MoralsEpisodes2Burtis a character onGilmore Girls, portrayed by Dion Anderson. Burt lives in Stars Hollow and is part of theBattle of Stars Hollowre-enactment group. He comes across as a slightly grumpy older man, though not abstaining from giving in to the whimsy of the town with a good attitude. characters.name: Caesar
characters.description: Caesar2nd Caesar1st CaesarBornCaesar (last name n/a)OccupationChef atLuke's DinerEyesHairDark BrownBlackSERIESPortrayed byAris AlvaradoSeason(s)2•3•4•5•6•7•AYITLFirst seenLast seenA-Tisket, A-TasketSpringEpisodes24(+several mentions)Caesaris a recurring character onGilmore Girls, portrayed chiefly byAris Alvarado, and numerous actors in non-speaking roles. Caesar is the chef atLuke's Diner. He is bubbly and sweet, albeit a tad stressed when there are a lot of customers and not completely at ease with having to deal with them at times when Luke is away and Caesar runs the diner.

Although she is mentioned in She is shown to have a much closer relationship with her son, unlike her husband, and is also portrayed as a close friend ofEmily.[2] Carol is the mother ofJason Stilesand wife ofFloyd Stiles. characters.name: Carrie Duncan
characters.description: Carrie DuncanBirthday1966AKACrazy CarrieOccupationHomemakerRELATIONSHIPSRomancesBarry(husband)Luke Danes(crush)The Second Troubadour(fling)FriendsLiz Danes• Anna • JillSERIESPortrayed byJill BrennanSeason(s)4•5First seenLast seenNag Hammadi Is Where They Found the Gnostic GospelsJews and Chinese FoodEpisodes3Carrie Duncanis a recurring character onGilmore Girls, portrayed by Jill Brennan. Carrie, often referred to as 'Crazy Carrie', who seems to like Luke, was one ofLiz Danes' best friends when they attendedStars Hollow High School. Carrie is first mentioned when Liz first makes an appearance inStars Hollow. When Liz tells Luke that she is staying with Carrie, Luke refers to her as 'Crazy Carrie Duncan', at which point Liz says: "She's not crazy, she just likes the boys." We find out that the unseen Carrie thinks that she made out with Luke underneath the bleachers at the Homecoming Game. Luke denies it.[1] Carrie, often referred to as 'Crazy Carrie', who seems to like Luke, was one ofLiz Danes' best friends when they attendedStars Hollow High School.

characters.name: Cezanne Moriarty
characters.description: Cezanne Moriarty is a former classmate ofLorelaiandChristopherwhoEmilyponders setting up with Christopher.  She does not appear on screen. She is divorced and, by Lorelai's estimation, is 10 years old her than she and Christopher.  Cezanne was just in her class because she was stupid and was, in fact, nicknamed "Moroniarity" by Lorelai.  (Driving Miss GIlmore)

characters.name: Charles Gilmore
characters.description: Charles GilmoreBornCharles Abbott GilmoreEducationYaleRELATIONSHIPSFamilyRichard Gilmore(son)Emily Gilmore(daughter-in-law)Lorelai "Trix" Gilmore(paternal second cousin)RomancesLorelai "Trix" Gilmore(wife/paternal second cousin)SERIESEpisodesEpisodes Charles Gilmoreis a character onGilmore Girls. Charles is the father ofRichard Gilmoreand the paternal grandfather ofLorelai Gilmore. Trix often speaks of her late husband, to whom she remains devoted. Richard occasionally mentions his father, and seems impressed by him, as he always is the Gilmore name, indicating that their relationship was positive.

characters.name: Charlie Eichner
characters.description: Charlie EichnerSERIESCharlie Eichneris an employee at theStamford Eagle Gazette.

characters.name: Christine
characters.description: ChristineBornChristine (surname n/a)EyesHairDark BrownDark BrownRELATIONSHIPSFamilyJun(mother)Lane Kim(cousin)Mrs. Kim(aunt)Mr. Kim(uncle)SERIESPortrayed byTessa LudwickSeason(s)Season 4Only seenScene in a MallChristineis a guest character onGilmore Girls, portrayed by Tessa Ludwick. Christine isLane'smaternal cousin, who visits with her mother when Lane moves out, to help. Christine appears very docile and obliging in her mother's presence, but babbles on once they reach Lane's room. Christine seems to be interested in exploring the world outside of hers and Lane's upbringing too, albeit in a slightly more rebel-without-a-cause way.

characters.name: Christopher Hayden
characters.description: Christopher HaydenBornChristopher HaydenBirthday1968AKAChrisOccupationCorporate RestructuringRELATIONSHIPSFamilyRory Gilmore(daughter, withLorelai)Georgia Hayden(daughter, withSherry)Francine Hayden(mother)Straub Hayden†(father)Mr. Hayden†(paternal grandfather)Rory's Baby(grandchild)RomancesLana(girlfriend)Lorelai Gilmore(ex-wife)Sherry Tinsdale(ex-wife)SERIESPortrayed byDavid SutcliffeSeason(s)1•2•3•5•6•7•AYITLFirst seenLast seenThat Damn Donna ReedFallEpisodes38 Christopher Haydenis a recurring character onGilmore Girls. He is portrayed byDavid Sutcliffe. Rory's father and Lorelai's high school boyfriend. He and Lorelai tried to start a relationship as adults several times, but the timing was always off. They do end up getting married spontaneously on atrip to Paris, but they separate (on good terms) only a few months later as Lorelai realizes they weren't right for each other. Christopher knew Lorelai is still in love with Luke and decide to step aside. He was previously married toSherry, with whom he has a daughter,Gigi. Rory's father and Lorelai's high school boyfriend. characters.description: Christopher HaydenBornChristopher HaydenBirthday1968AKAChrisOccupationCorporate RestructuringRELATIONSHIPSFamilyRory Gilmore(daughter, withLorelai)Georgia Hayden(daughter, withSherry)Francine Hayden(mother)Straub Hayden†(father)Mr. Hayden†(paternal grandfather)Rory's Baby(grandchild)RomancesLana(girlfriend)Lorelai Gilmore(ex-wife)Sherry Tinsdale(ex-wife)SERIESPortrayed byDavid SutcliffeSeason(s)1•2•3•5•6•7•AYITLFirst seenLast seenThat Damn Donna ReedFallEpisodes38 Christopher Haydenis a recurring character onGilmore Girls. He is portrayed byDavid Sutcliffe. Rory's father and Lorelai's high school boyfriend. He and Lorelai tried to start a relationship as adults several times, but the timing was always off. They do end up getting married spontaneously on atrip to Paris, but they separate (on good terms) only a few months later as Lorelai realizes they weren't right for each other. Christopher knew Lorelai is still in love with Luke and decide to step aside. He was previously married toSherry, with whom he has a daughter,Gigi. Rory's father and Lorelai's high school boyfriend. characters.name: Cissy
characters.description: CissyEducationStudent atChilton Preparatory SchoolHairBlondeSERIESPortrayed byKara HoldenSeason(s)Season 1Only seenRory's DanceCissyis a guest character inSeason 1ofGilmore Girls, portrayed byKara Holden. Cissy isTristin's date to theChiltonformal dance inRory's Dance.  When Tristin doesn't feel like dancing or eating, she asks if he wants to make out.  Since Tristin tells Rory he is taking Cissy to the dance, it is presumable she knows her, so we can assume she also goes to Chilton.
